title: Edith Wharton Writing Residency
description: A one-week residency at The Mount, Edith Wharton's historic estate in Lenox, Massachusetts, run jointly with the Straw Dog Writers Guild. Nine emerging poets, fiction writers, and creative nonfiction writers (defined as not yet having published a book or chapbook) are selected for one-week stays during March 2027, each receiving a $500 stipend, up to $250 in travel reimbursement, a dedicated private workspace at The Mount, and private lodging with an ensuite bath at a nearby inn. Applications for this cycle are not yet open -- the window runs September 1 through October 1, 2026. There is a $25 application fee, waived for Straw Dog Writers Guild/Mount members or in cases of financial hardship.
org: The Mount (Edith Wharton's Home) / Straw Dog Writers Guild
visaNote: This is a one-week creative residency, not employment; international writers should confirm current US entry requirements for a short visitor stay with The Mount and their nearest US consulate.
